title: Bernstein reiterates $67 Figure target after Q1 loan volumes double, sees 72% upside from tokenization thesis
message_html: Bernstein reiterates $67 Figure target after Q1 loan volumes double, sees 72% upside from tokenization thesis ...
snippet: Bernstein reiterates $67 Figure target with 72% upside after Q1 loan volumes jump 113% year-over-year to $2.9 billion.
